---
title: "Biogeospatial"
---

This is the landing page for the Biogeospatial github organisation.

One of its main purposes is to serve the documentation for the [Biodiverse](https://shawnlaffan.github.io/biodiverse/) software.

- [Quick start guide](https://biogeospatial.github.io/biodiverse-quick-start/)

- [Analysis indices](https://biogeospatial.github.io/biodiverse-indices/)

- [Spatial conditions](https://biogeospatial.github.io/biodiverse-spatial-conditions/)

- [Publications using Biodiverse](https://biogeospatial.github.io/biodiverse-publication-list/)

[![](images/Aus_endemism_2cell_2deg_200dpi.png){width="220"}](http://shawnlaffan.github.io/biodiverse/)

![](images/clipboard-1107273699.png)
